sections.paragraph:
ϰληρονομέω [κληρονόμος]

—1. ‘be an heir’ in legal sense, inherit Gal 4:30.

—2. ‘be recipient of a share (in)’, with focus on experience of divine conferral of promised benefits, the dominant sense in NT acquire, obtain, inherit Mt 5:5; 19:29; Mk 10:17; 1 Cor 6:9f; Hb 1:4; 12:17; Rv 21:7.
